title: salix cinereoides
intro: Salix cinereoides, also known as the Ashy Willow or Grey Willow, is a species of willow tree native to China and parts of the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent properties due to its high content of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix cinereoides include relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Salix cinereoides can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
